description: Resource Type definition for an Amazon Lex conversational bot performing automated tasks such as ordering a pizza, booking a hotel, and so on.

ErrorLogSettings.description: Error logs configuration for this bot. This is used by Amazon Lex to emit any errors that occur during Lex Runtime API invocations.

Enabled.description: Specify whether error log feature has been enabled

Description.description: Resource Type definition for the intent.

ReplicaRegion.description: The secondary region that will be used in the replication of the source bot.
